Plan.path: Plan > Target Audience Analysis > Intelligence collection (OSINT / SOCMINT / SIGINT / HUMINT / GEOINT / FININT / MASINT / OSINT-AI) > SOCMINT — social-media intelligence > Other / cross-cutting > Face-recognition matching (PimEyes, Clearview-class)

Prepare.technique: Reporting decision shift through legitimacy preparation

exposure_network_assignment.edge_meaning: The source position is a visible peer whose output was plausibly exposed to the target position; derived from source user liking, reposting, or quoting target user content in the raw data.
